errors.description:
Runtime checkable protocol `MarinTokenizer` has an unsafe overlap with type `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase`
  Attribute `vocab_size` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.vocab_size` or `MarinTokenizer.vocab_size` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility

  Attribute `eos_token_id` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.eos_token_id` or `MarinTokenizer.eos_token_id` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `pad_token_id` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.pad_token_id` or `MarinTokenizer.pad_token_id` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `bos_token` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.bos_token` or `MarinTokenizer.bos_token` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `eos_token` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.eos_token` or `MarinTokenizer.eos_token` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `decode` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.decode` has type `(self: PreTrainedTokenizerBase, token_ids: int | list[int] | ndarray | Unknown, skip_special_tokens: bool = False, clean_up_tokenization_spaces: bool | None = None, **kwargs: Unknown) -> str`, which is not assignable to `(self: MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase, ids: list[int], *, skip_special_tokens: bool = False) -> str`, the type of `MarinTokenizer.decode`
  Attribute `encode_batch` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.encode_batch` or `MarinTokenizer.encode_batch` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `convert_ids_to_tokens` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.convert_ids_to_tokens` or `MarinTokenizer.convert_ids_to_tokens` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `convert_tokens_to_ids` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.convert_tokens_to_ids` or `MarinTokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
  Attribute `apply_chat_template` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.apply_chat_template` has type `(self: PreTrainedTokenizerBase, conversation: list[dict[str, str]] | list[list[dict[str, str]]], tools: list[((...) -> Unknown) | dict[Unknown, Unknown]] | None = None, documents: list[dict[str, str]] | None = None, chat_template: str | None = None, add_generation_prompt: bool = False, continue_final_message: bool = False, tokenize: bool = True, padding: PaddingStrategy | bool | str = False, truncation: bool = False, max_length: int | None = None, return_tensors: TensorType | str | None = None, return_dict: bool = False, return_assistant_tokens_mask: bool = False, tokenizer_kwargs: dict[str, Any] | None = None, **kwargs: Unknown) -> BatchEncoding | list[int] | list[list[int]] | list[str] | str`, which is not assignable to `(self: MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase, conversation: list[dict[str, str]], *, tokenize: bool = True, add_generation_prompt: bool = False, **kwargs: Unknown) -> list[int] | str`, the type of `MarinTokenizer.apply_chat_template`
  Attribute `apply_chat_template_with_masks` has incompatible types: `MarinTokenizer | PreTrainedTokenizerBase.apply_chat_template_with_masks` or `MarinTokenizer.apply_chat_template_with_masks` uses `__getattr__`, which cannot be checked for override compatibility
